name: iPhone 15 Pro
description: Apple's most powerful iPhone. The A17 Pro chip, titanium frame, and advanced camera system deliver a professional photography experience like no other.

name: MacBook Air M3
description: Incredible performance with the M3 chip and up to 18 hours of battery life. Ultra-thin design makes it the perfect companion for work anywhere.

name: AirPods Max
description: Experience music in a whole new dimension with industry-leading Active Noise Cancellation and immersive Spatial Audio.

name: Apple Watch S9
description: Power on your wrist — health tracking, notifications, and seamless Apple ecosystem integration in one sleek device.

name: iPad Pro 13"
description: The ultimate creative powerhouse. Ultra Retina XDR display and M4 chip combined with Apple Pencil support for limitless expression.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24
description: Galaxy AI-powered smart features and exceptional camera performance. The best of Android in one flagship device.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5
description: Industry-best noise cancellation technology. Up to 30 hours of battery life with crystal-clear sound quality.

name: Apple TV 4K
description: Transform your home into an entertainment hub with 4K HDR, Dolby Vision, and Apple Arcade.

name: AirPods Pro 2
description: 2x more powerful noise cancellation with the H2 chip. Adaptive Audio automatically tunes to your environment.

name: MagSafe Charger
description: Fast, wireless charging with magnetic alignment. Compatible with iPhone 12 and all later models.
